name: SunTrust Banks, Inc.
description: SunTrust Banks, Inc. was a prominent American bank holding company that provided a wide range of financial services, including consumer and commercial banking, mortgage banking, and wealth management. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, it served clients across the Southeastern United States. In 2019, SunTrust merged with BB&T Corporation to form Truist Financial Corporation, a top 10 U.S. commercial bank headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina. Today, the legacy of SunTrust continues under the Truist brand, which remains committed to delivering deep financial knowledge and unwavering care to its clients and communities.
